title: Cortex XDR IOCs - Disable expired IOCs in XDR
content:
This is a *sub-playbook* of "Cortex XDR IOCs - Push new IOCs to XDR (Main)". This playbook disables indicators in Cortex XDR after they expire from Cortex XSOAR using a loop and querying on the "xdr_pushed" tag.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (CortexXDR, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Malware.

Inputs — batch_size; query.

Integrations/scripts used: Cortex XDR - IOC, SearchIndicator, Set.

  playbookInputQuery:

  required: true

  playbookInputQuery:
